title: centaurea vankovii
intro: Centaurea vankovii, also known as the Vankov's knapweed or centaurea vankovii, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea vankovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
